questions.question: State the basic principle of ANOVA and provide an example to illustrate this principle. (5 marks)
Compare and contrast one-way ANOVA and two-way ANOVA. Provide an example where each technique would be used. (10 marks)

A researcher wants to investigate the effect of two different fertilizers on the yield of a crop. She designs a Latin-square experiment with three treatments and three replicates. Calculate the expected mean square for each treatment and for the error. (10 marks)
